Understanding Glycemic Index

Why GI matters for your daily health choices

75

How Food Affects
Your Blood Sugar

01 You eat carbohydrates → broken down into glucose
02 Glucose enters your blood → speed depends on fiber and processing
03 Speed determines GI score → below 55 = slow release, stable energy
WIN-DIA GI = 44 — certified LOW

How WIN-DIA Works for You

What the Lab Tests Show
Blood Sugar StabilityGI Score: 48

A blood sugar score of 48 (certified LOW) means WIN-DIA releases energy slowly — no sudden spikes, no crashes. Ideal for diabetics and pre-diabetics.

Zero ContaminantsNABL Verified

NABL-accredited lab testing confirms zero pesticide residues, zero heavy metals above limits, and no harmful bacteria including E. coli and Salmonella.

Heart-Safe FormulaCholesterol: 0 mg

Cholesterol was below the limit of quantification — effectively zero. Healthy poly-unsaturated fats (17.19g per 100g) actively support cardiovascular health.

Long Shelf Stability6+ Months

Accelerated shelf-life testing confirms microbiological safety and full sensory acceptability for over 6 months — without artificial preservatives.

What You Will Feel Daily
Steady Energy, All DayENERGY

Slow energy release means you stay focused and satisfied — without mid-morning fatigue or sudden hunger spikes.

Gut Flora SupportDIGESTION

Coconut flour acts as prebiotic fuel, nourishing beneficial gut bacteria for better digestion and immune resilience.

Muscle MaintenanceSTRENGTH

With 22.13g of protein per 100g — higher than most packaged snacks — WIN-DIA supports muscle repair and lean body composition.

Weight ConsciousnessSATIETY

4.84g of fiber per 100g triggers satiety signals faster and keeps you fuller longer, reducing unnecessary snacking.

Frequently
Asked

If your question is not answered here, reach us directly — we will respond with the actual lab data.

Yes. The certified GI of 44 places WIN-DIA firmly in the LOW category. Glucose is absorbed slowly, preventing sharp spikes.

WIN-DIA uses coconut flour as primary ingredient, delivering prebiotic fiber, dramatically lower GI, and zero cholesterol.

Absolutely. It's an everyday snack with no artificial preservatives, verified by shelf-life testing.

Yes, our Gluten Free Khakhra uses coconut, green banana, amaranth flours and lentils.

NABL-accredited lab testing, CFTRI food scientist guidance, FSSAI compliance.
